cases.name: live_search_todo_count
cases.prompt: Use search.rg to find all occurrences of "TODO" under the workspace. You MUST call the tool. Then answer with only the total count as a number.

cases.name: live_git_status_json_summary
cases.prompt: Call git.status for the workspace root. You MUST call the tool. Then output ONLY a JSON object with keys: isRepo (boolean), branch (string or null), entriesCount (number).
